'''鈭歴h-b-f''' ('''kashabaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:prebake|prebake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:prebake|prebake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-b-f
|-
! Lemma
| kashabaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishabaf|thishabaf]] || [[word:jishabaf|jishabaf]] || [[word:shishabaf|shishabaf]] || [[word:kishabaf|kishabaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushabaf|thuthushabaf]] || [[word:jujushabaf|jujushabaf]] || [[word:shushushabaf|shushushabaf]] || [[word:kukushabaf|kukushabaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushabaf|thushabaf]] || [[word:jushabaf|jushabaf]] || [[word:shushabaf|shushabaf]] || [[word:kushabaf|kushabaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushabaf|thushabaf]] || [[word:jushabaf|jushabaf]] || [[word:shushabaf|shushabaf]] || [[word:kushabaf|kushabaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshabaf|theshabaf]] || [[word:jeshabaf|jeshabaf]] || [[word:sheshabaf|sheshabaf]] || [[word:keshabaf|keshabaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshabaf|thothoshabaf]] || [[word:jojoshabaf|jojoshabaf]] || [[word:shoshoshabaf|shoshoshabaf]] || [[word:kokoshabaf|kokoshabaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshabaf|thoshabaf]] || [[word:joshabaf|joshabaf]] || [[word:shoshabaf|shoshabaf]] || [[word:koshabaf|koshabaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshabaf|thoshabaf]] || [[word:joshabaf|joshabaf]] || [[word:shoshabaf|shoshabaf]] || [[word:koshabaf|koshabaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shabaf|th忙shabaf]] || [[word:j忙shabaf|j忙shabaf]] || [[word:sh忙shabaf|sh忙shabaf]] || [[word:k忙shabaf|k忙shabaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashabaf|thathashabaf]] || [[word:jajashabaf|jajashabaf]] || [[word:shashashabaf|shashashabaf]] || [[word:kakashabaf|kakashabaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashabaf|thashabaf]] || [[word:jashabaf|jashabaf]] || [[word:shashabaf|shashabaf]] || [[word:kashabaf|kashabaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashabaf|thashabaf]] || [[word:jashabaf|jashabaf]] || [[word:shashabaf|shashabaf]] || [[word:kashabaf|kashabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashabaf|shashabaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashabaf|goshashabaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashabaf|gokishashabaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashabafn眉|shashabafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashabafnkn眉|goshashabafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashabafn眉|gokishashabafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashabafsh毛|shashabafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashabafnksh毛|goshashabafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashabafsh毛|gokishashabafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashabafro|shashabafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashabafnkro|goshashabafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashabafro|gokishashabafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashabafmu|shashabafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashabafnkmu|goshashabafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashabafmu|gokishashabafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashabafsher|shashabafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashabafnksher|goshashabafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashabafsher|gokishashabafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashabafng|shashabafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashabafnkng|goshashabafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashabafng|gokishashabafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashabafya|shashabafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashabafnkya|goshashabafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashabafya|gokishashabafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashabafyam|shashabafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashabafnkyam|goshashabafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashabafyam|gokishashabafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashabafn眉sh毛|shashabafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashabafnkn眉sh毛|goshashabafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashabafn眉sh毛|gokishashabafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashabafn眉ro|shashabafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashabafnkn眉ro|goshashabafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashabafn眉ro|gokishashabafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashabafn眉mu|shashabafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashabafnkn眉mu|goshashabafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashabafn眉mu|gokishashabafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashabafsh毛n眉|shashabafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashabafnksh毛n眉|goshashabafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashabafsh毛n眉|gokishashabafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashabafsh毛ro|shashabafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashabafnksh毛ro|goshashabafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashabafsh毛ro|gokishashabafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashabafsh毛mu|shashabafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashabafnksh毛mu|goshashabafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashabafsh毛mu|gokishashabafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashabafron眉|shashabafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashabafnkron眉|goshashabafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashabafron眉|gokishashabafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashabafrosh毛|shashabafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashabafnkrosh毛|goshashabafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashabafrosh毛|gokishashabafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashabafromu|shashabafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashabafnkromu|goshashabafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashabafromu|gokishashabafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashabafmun眉|shashabafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashabafnkmun眉|goshashabafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashabafmun眉|gokishashabafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashabafmush毛|shashabafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashabafnkmush毛|goshashabafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashabafmush毛|gokishashabafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashabafmuro|shashabafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashabafnkmuro|goshashabafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashabafmuro|gokishashabafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
